items.title: At least 11 killed after military plane carrying banknotes crashes in Bolivia
items.dek: The aircraft crashed while landing in the city of El Alto, reportedly hitting vehicles on a motorway.
items.body: The aircraft crashed while landing in the city of El Alto, reportedly hitting vehicles on a motorway.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Bill Clinton asked about hot tub photo and testifies he knew 'nothing' of Epstein crimes
items.dek: The former president told the committe that he would never have flown on Epstein's plane if he "had any inkling of what he was doing".
items.body: The former president told the committe that he would never have flown on Epstein's plane if he "had any inkling of what he was doing".
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: A 'delicate' balance for Canada and a 'win-win' for Modi as Carney visits India
items.dek: The two countries are repairing a strained relationship as they also seek to reduce their trade reliance on the US.
items.body: The two countries are repairing a strained relationship as they also seek to reduce their trade reliance on the US.
items.author: IriLine Desk
